subject: Chemistry
solution:
The compound(s) formed upon the combustion of sodium metal in the excess air is sodium peroxide (Na2O2) and sodium oxide (Na2O).

$$ \begin{aligned} & 4 \mathrm{Na}+\mathrm{O}_2 \rightarrow 2 \mathrm{Na}_2 \mathrm{O} \\\\ & 2 \mathrm{Na}+\mathrm{O}_2 \rightarrow \mathrm{Na}_2 \mathrm{O}_2 \end{aligned} $$
title: IIT-JEE 2009 Paper 1 Offline
